claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Luminance uses Legal-Grade™ agents to automate, expedite and enhance contract activity across the business.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The homepage does not contain a link to the pricing page, making it impossible to access in two clicks.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: The homepage contains a 'Request a demo' link which implies that a demo may require login or submission of details.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Luminance has partnered with top providers in the Business Transformation space, who bring their expertise to a wide range of services including technology readiness assessment, adoption project management and integration support.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
